inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 consolidated free cash flow $120M (8-K 2026-02-25) × Class A attribution 41.6% ($30.1M NI / $72.4M consolidated NI) ÷ 27.838M Class A shares; maintenance capex ~$4.2M consolidated (10-K FY2025)
inputs.shares_source: 8-K FY2025 results: 27,838,199 Class A shares Dec 31, 2025
inputs.book_per_share_caveat: Class A stockholders equity $340.3M; land largely in intangibles at acquisition cost — not a fair-value dhando floor for 315k+ acres
inputs.normalization_note: Up-C structure: Lawrence base uses Class A-attributable owner cash, not consolidated FCF per Class A share without NCI adjustment. Q1 2026 run-rate higher ($40.9M consolidated FCF) — not used as FCF₀.

optionality_gate.floor_value_note: Conservative $4,000/acre on ~315k surface acres [Assumption]; acquisitions capitalized in intangibles; bolt-ons at higher $/acre
optionality_gate.overlay_nav_note: Illustrative $6,000/acre on 315k acres + cash; price $73 embeds premium to conservative NAV overlay
optionality_gate.notes: Unlike TPL 1888 zero-book pattern, LB marks acquired land in intangibles — but GAAP book (~$12/sh) still understates Delaware acreage scarcity.

gaap_vs_fair_value.policy_source: 10-K FY2025: fee surface acres capitalized through acquisitions; not full portfolio mark-to-market each quarter
gaap_vs_fair_value.source: 10-K FY2025 Item 1 Business (own or manage 315k+ acres Dec 31, 2025)

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Digital infrastructure / data-center easement pipeline sizing beyond press releases
Per-acre marks on 2026 bolt-on acquisitions (~5,700 acres Q1 2026)
Full related-party revenue normalization vs WaterBridge (WBI) ecosystem

segments_or_options.label: Digital infrastructure / data-center surface option
segments_or_options.evidence: 10-K and Q1 2026 PR cite digital infrastructure opportunity; no SEC-sized contract in base FCF

segments_or_options.label: Undeveloped Delaware acreage (incremental easements)
segments_or_options.nav_assumption: Incremental $/acre above producing run-rate; 450 new easements FY2025 per 8-K

segments.label: Surface use royalties (incl. related party)
segments.owner_cash_source: FY2025 surface royalties $72.8M × 41.6% attribution ÷ 27.838M shares; ~89% cash conversion [Assumption]
segments.evidence: 8-K FY2025 revenue table; WaterBridge Stateline AMI drives related-party surface fees

segments.label: Resource sales, resource royalties, oil and gas royalties
segments.owner_cash_source: FY2025 combined resource/O&G lines $60.3M × 41.6% attribution ÷ shares
segments.evidence: 8-K FY2025 revenue table; more cyclical than easement base

options.label: Digital infrastructure option
options.base_terminal_rationale: Pre-revenue at scale in SEC filings — explicit zero terminal; sized in nav_overlay
options.evidence: Q1 2026 earnings PR cites digital infrastructure; no base FCF embed

corporate_drag.note: G&A and interest burden on Class A share; FY2025 G&A $62.4M consolidated (10-K)

bear.notes: Permian activity slowdown; related-party revenue mix; leverage refi at higher rates (~$560M LT debt)

base.notes: FY2025 normalized Class A FCF $1.82/sh; mgmt 2026 Adj EBITDA guide $210-230M (8-K 2026-05-06) not in FCF₀

bull.notes: Digital infrastructure easements + acreage monetization; sponsor alignment improves

stance_proposal.override_reason: Scarce Delaware acreage and fee-based model give partial dhando, but ~1.8% Lawrence base at $73, Up-C sponsor control, and ~$560M debt cap stance despite growth narrative

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: 315k acres vs $340M Class A equity (~$12/sh); intangibles $137M at acquisition cost not full scarcity value (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / acreage / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Active land management; 450 new easements FY2025; digital infrastructure cited in Q1 2026 PR

option_scan.question: Backlog not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: 2026 Adj EBITDA outlook raised; digital/data-center pipeline not in Lawrence FCF₀

option_scan.question: Private / illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Operating land company, not holdco of marks

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: WaterBridge-related surface royalties already in surface segment growth

growth_explanation.mechanism: More easements and surface royalties on 315k Delaware acres as WaterBridge/WBI infrastructure and E&P activity expand; bolt-on acquisitions add acreage.
growth_explanation.base_growth_assumption: 8% years 1-5 on normalized Class A FCF — below mgmt EBITDA guide to avoid double-count

theory_implied.derivation: segment_build owner-cash weighted blend (growth only; exit from scenarios.base)

paths.label: Segment-derived growth (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

paths.label: NAV overlay dated payoff (10yr to overlay base)
paths.weight_why: Answers a different question (NAV convergence) than 10yr cash-flow IRR; capped weight to avoid theory conflation.
weight_falsifiers: NAV overlay base not updated when segment build or filings change >10%
floor_pass false but weight above 15% without [HUMAN REVIEW]

qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Third-party confirms asset quality not in GAAP book; not full floor at spot price

flags: NAV overlay is a different theory (asset payoff vs cash-flow IRR); weight capped at 10% to limit theory conflation.

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
